channel.title: crafter — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by crafter (crafter).

item.title: CVE-2026-1770 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources in Crafter Studio
item.description: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources vulnerability in Crafter Studio of Crafter CMS allows authenticated developers to execute OS commands via Groovy Sandbox Bypass. By inserting malicious Groovy elements, an attacker may bypass san…

item.title: CVE-2025-6384 · 7.3 HIGH — Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources in Crafter Studio
item.description: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources vulnerability in Crafter Studio of CrafterCMS allows authenticated developers to execute OS commands via Groovy Sandbox Bypass. By inserting malicious Groovy elements, an attacker may bypass Sand…

item.title: CVE-2025-0502 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Transmission of Private Resources into a New Sphere in Crafter Engine
item.description: Transmission of Private Resources into a New Sphere ('Resource Leak') vulnerability in CrafterCMS Engine on Linux, MacOS, x86, Windows, 64 bit, ARM allows Directory Indexing, Resource Leak Exposure.This issue affects CrafterCMS: from 4.0.0 before 4.0…

item.title: CVE-2023-4136 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in Crafter Engine
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in CrafterCMS Engine on Windows, MacOS, Linux, x86, ARM, 64 bit allows Reflected XSS.This issue affects CrafterCMS: from 4.0.0 through 4.0.2, from 3.1.…

item.title: CVE-2023-26020 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') in Crafter Studio
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Crafter Studio on Linux, MacOS, Windows, x86, ARM, 64 bit allows SQL Injection.This issue affects CrafterCMS v4.0 from 4.0.0 through 4.0.1, and v3.1…

item.title: CVE-2022-40635 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources in Crafter Studio
item.description: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources vulnerability in Crafter Studio of Crafter CMS allows authenticated developers to execute OS commands via Groovy Sandbox Bypass.

item.title: CVE-2022-40634 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources in Crafter Studio
item.description: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources vulnerability in Crafter Studio of Crafter CMS allows authenticated developers to execute OS commands via FreeMarker SSTI.

item.title: CVE-2021-23267 · 7.6 HIGH — Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources in Crafter Studio
item.description: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources vulnerability in Crafter Studio of Crafter CMS allows authenticated developers to execute OS commands via FreeMarker static methods.

item.title: CVE-2021-23266 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper Output Neutralization for Logs in Crafter Studio
item.description: An anonymous user can craft a URL with text that ends up in the log viewer as is. The text can then include textual messages to mislead the administrator.

item.title: CVE-2021-23265 · 3.5 LOW — Improper Privilege Management in Crafter Studio
item.description: A logged-in and authenticated user with a Reviewer Role may lock a content item.

item.title: CVE-2021-23264 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Transmission of Private Resources into a New Sphere ('Resource Leak') and Exposure of Resource to Wrong Sphere in Crafter Search
item.description: Installations, where crafter-search is not protected, allow unauthenticated remote attackers to create, view, and delete search indexes.

item.title: CVE-2021-23263 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Transmission of Private Resources into a New Sphere ('Resource Leak') in Crafter Engine
item.description: Unauthenticated remote attackers can read textual content via FreeMarker including files /scripts/*, /templates/* and some of the files in /.git/* (non-binary).

item.title: CVE-2021-23262 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Snakeyaml deserialization vulnerability bypass
item.description: Authenticated administrators may modify the main YAML configuration file and load a Java class resulting in RCE.

item.title: CVE-2021-23261 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Overriding the system configuration file causes a denial of service
item.description: Authenticated administrators may override the system configuration file and cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2021-23260 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Stored XSS Vulnerability in File Name of the File Upload function
item.description: Authenticated users with Site roles may inject XSS scripts via file names that will execute in the browser for this and other users of the same site.

item.title: CVE-2021-23259 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Groovy Sandbox Bypass
item.description: Authenticated users with Administrator or Developer roles may execute OS commands by Groovy Script which uses Groovy lib to render a webpage. The groovy script does not have security restrictions, which will cause attackers to execute arbitrary comma…

item.title: CVE-2021-23258 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Spring SPEL Expression Language Injection
item.description: Authenticated users with Administrator or Developer roles may execute OS commands by SPEL Expression in Spring beans. SPEL Expression does not have security restrictions, which will cause attackers to execute arbitrary commands remotely (RCE).

item.title: CVE-2020-25803 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Authenticated attackers with developer privileges in Crafter Studio may execute OS commands via deep inspection of FreeMarker template exposed objects.
item.description: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources vulnerability in Crafter Studio of Crafter CMS allows authenticated developers to execute OS commands via FreeMarker template exposed objects. This issue affects: Crafter Software Crafter CMS 3.0…

item.title: CVE-2020-25802 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Authenticated attackers with developer privileges in Crafter Studio may execute OS commands via Groovy scripting.
item.description: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources vulnerability in Crafter Studio of Crafter CMS allows authenticated developers to execute OS commands via Groovy scripting. This issue affects: Crafter Software Crafter CMS 3.0 versions prior to…
